nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: LACTOBACILLUS/LYCIUM CHINENSE FRUIT/REHMANNIA GLUTINOSA ROOT/CUSCUTA CHINENSIS FRUIT/CISTANCHE DESERTICOLA/ZANTHOXYLUM PIPERITUM FRUIT/CHRYSANTHEMUM MORIFOLIUM FRUIT/PORIA COCOS/CINNAMOMUM CASSIA RAMULUS BARK FERMENT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Lactobacillus/Lycium Chinense Fruit/Rehmannia Glutinosa Root/Cuscuta Chinensis Fruit/Cistanche Deserticola/Zanthoxylum Piperitum Fruit/Chrysanthemum Morifolium Fruit/Poria Cocos/Cinnamomum Cassia Ramulus Bark Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Lycium chinense fruit, Rehmannia glutinosa root, Cuscuta chinensis fruit, Cistanche deserticola, Zanthoxylum piperitum fruit, Chrysanthemum morifolium fruit, Poria cocos, Cinnamommum cassia ramulus bark by the microorganism, Lactobacillus
inciName: LACTOBACILLUS/LYCIUM CHINENSE FRUIT/REHMANNIA GLUTINOSA ROOT/CUSCUTA CHINENSIS FRUIT/CISTANCHE DESERTICOLA/ZANTHOXYLUM PIPERITUM FRUIT/CHRYSANTHEMUM MORIFOLIUM FRUIT/PORIA COCOS/CINNAMOMUM CASSIA RAMULUS BARK FERMENT FILTRATE
